productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Chelsea Striped Navy Shorts
description: CompositionNavy blue shorts made of 100% polyester, with mesh lining, welt pockets, drawcord elastic waist, embroidered logo on the left and adidas Essential 3-Stripes along the lengthFittingComfortWash care Wash with like colours Wash and iron inside out Do not use fabric softener Use mild detergent only Do not iron motif/print/trims/logo Designed using dry comfort technology, this polyester shorts wicks sweat away from your skin, allowing your skin to breathe comfortably while you run or workout, letting you focus on getting beyond that extra mile or lap. While the soft and broad elastic waistband sits snugly, the white strips on the sides allow free and flexible movement. The drawstrings on the inside allow you to create a customised Fit, while the deep side pockets can hold your essentials, including an iPod, when you're on the move. Pair it with a ClimaCool t-shirt from adidas and achieve maximum performance.   Model's Statistics1. The model wears trousers, length of 41" 2. Height-6", Waist-32"
